description: Multi-line text input with optional param sync.

label.description: Label text displayed above the text area

param.description: The canvas parameter name to sync with, or form field name if inside a Form component. If omitted, works as a regular text area.

submitMode.description: Controls when the text area value is sent: type sends while typing, focus sends on blur, and submit sends only from the inline submit button or Enter key.

style.description: Inline CSS styles as a plain CSS string (e.g., "color: red; font-size: 16px")
